productDisplayName: Gini and Jony Boys White Shirt
description: Composition White shirt made of 100% cotton, has a spread collar, long sleeves with buttoned flaps on the cuffs, buttoned placket on the front, a pocket on the left chest with buttoned flap, brand name embroidered above the left pocket and on the right side, buttoned flaps on the shoulders and a curved hem Fit Regular Wash care Machine wash in cold water with like colours and mild detergent Wash/dry inside out Do not tumble dry Use warm iron Do not iron on decoration Remove all detachable accessories before washing boys will love this shirt from Gini and Jony. The patch pockets on the front and the brand detailing adds to the cool vibe, while the cotton fabric keeps him feeling fresh and comfortable all day. Team this with shorts and comfy footwear for a stylish, casual look.
